utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes: property (fully detailed with name, details, price), financing (fully specified with type and all terms), legal_services (specified with service type and costs), moving_services (specified with service level and costs), setup_services (specified with service type and costs), and total_budget (provided with a complete cost breakdown). All 6 required items appear and are fully specified with appropriate details. There is one extra item (property_survey) but that does not affect completeness of required ones. Therefore, all 6 out of 6 are covered completely.
